report_name: CVSS 10.0 Flaws in Azure HorizonDB and DbGate Expose Cloud Environments to RCE

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-48567
vulnerabilities.description: An unauthenticated privilege bypass vulnerability in Azure HorizonDB that allows a remote, network-based attacker to bypass all authentication mechanisms and gain elevated privileges, resulting in administrative control over the database.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-47668
vulnerabilities.description: A remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability in the DbGate JSON script runner component. It allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code through a simple code injection, leading to a complete system compromise.

indicators.name: DbGate Process Execution
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: DbGate Process Execution
id: 2b8a1c9d-e4f5-4b3c-8a1d-9f8e7d6c5b4a
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of the DbGate process. This could be a precursor to exploitation of CVE-2026-47668 or part of routine administrative activity.
references:
  - https://research.checkpoint.com/2026/8th-june-threat-intelligence-report/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-08
tags:
  - attack.t1190
level: informational
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\dbgate.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of the DbGate process, which is mentioned as a hunting hint for potential exploitation of CVE-2026-47668.

indicators.name: Suspicious Child Process Spawned by DbGate
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious Child Process Spawned by DbGate
id: 8c3d5b1a-9e8f-4a7b-8c1d-6f5e4d3c2b1a
status: experimental
description: Detects the DbGate process spawning a command shell, which may indicate successful remote code execution via CVE-2026-47668.
references:
  - https://research.checkpoint.com/2026/8th-june-threat-intelligence-report/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-08
tags:
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.execution
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\dbgate.exe'
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects DbGate spawning unusual child processes like cmd.exe or powershell.exe, a hunting hint provided in the article for identifying successful RCE exploitation of CVE-2026-47668.
